overview.description: The Amplify Bitcoin Max Income Covered Call ETF (BAGY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long btc, short usd currency. The fund seeks to maximize current income through a synthetic covered call strategy tied to the price return of Bitcoin. The actively managed ETF targets 30-60% annualized option premium, using both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options. BAGY was launched on Apr 29, 2025 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
